messages.content: You see a beautiful red house on your left, a fantastic greenhouse on your right, and an attractive pink place in front of you. Where is the white house located?

trialA.output:
This is a classic lateral thinking / trick question.

The answer is **Washington, D.C.** (or simply: **in Washington**).

The question describes you looking around in various directions, but the "White House" isn't part of the scene being described — it's a well-known landmark located in Washington, D.C. The description is just a setup to make you think spatially, when the answer has nothing to do with your orientation. 🏛️
